title: The Ultimate Solopreneur Agent Harness for AI Builders (Claude Code Harness)
summary: Ron Demerit's Solopreneur Agent Harness is an orchestration framework for Claude that coordinates 16 specialized sub-agents, a product manager agent, and session locking. It routes tasks dynamically to Opus, Sonnet, and Haiku models and includes guard rails for client isolation and multi-project work.
